207→internal fun <Output> SignedIntParser(
208→    minDigits: Int?,
209→    maxDigits: Int?,
210→    spacePadding: Int?,
211→    setter: AssignableField<Output, Int>,
212→    name: String,
213→    plusOnExceedsWidth: Int?,
214→): ParserStructure<Output> {
215→    val parsers = mutableListOf(
216→        spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, maxDigits, spacePadding, setter, name, withMinus = true)
217→    )
218→    if (plusOnExceedsWidth != null) {
219→        parsers.add(
220→            spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, plusOnExceedsWidth, spacePadding, setter, name)
221→        )
222→        parsers.add(
223→            ParserStructure(
224→                listOf(
225→                    PlainStringParserOperation("+"),
226→                    NumberSpanParserOperation(
227→                        listOf(
228→                            UnsignedIntConsumer(
229→                                plusOnExceedsWidth + 1,
230→                                maxDigits,
231→                                setter,
232→                                name,
233→                                multiplyByMinus1 = false
234→                            )
235→                        )
236→                    )
237→                ),
238→                emptyList()
239→            )
240→        )
241→    } else {
242→        parsers.add(
243→            spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, maxDigits, spacePadding, setter, name)
244→        )
245→    }
246→    return ParserStructure(
247→        emptyList(),
248→        parsers,
249→    )
250→}
251→
252→// With maxWidth = 4,
253→// padWidth = 7: "   " + (four digits | " " (three digits | " " (two digits | " ", one digit)))
254→// padWidth = 3: three to four digits | " " (two digits | " ", one digit)
255→internal fun <Target> spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(
256→    minDigits: Int?,
257→    maxDigits: Int?,
258→    spacePadding: Int?,
259→    setter: AssignableField<Target, Int>,
260→    name: String,
261→    withMinus: Boolean = false,
262→): ParserStructure<Target> {
263→    val minNumberLength = (minDigits ?: 1) + if (withMinus) 1 else 0
264→    val maxNumberLength = maxDigits?.let { if (withMinus) it + 1 else it } ?: Int.MAX_VALUE
265→    val spacePadding = spacePadding ?: 0
266→    fun numberOfRequiredLengths(minNumberLength: Int, maxNumberLength: Int): ParserStructure<Target> {
267→        check(maxNumberLength >= 1 + if (withMinus) 1 else 0)
268→        return ParserStructure(
269→            buildList {
270→                if (withMinus) add(PlainStringParserOperation("-"))
271→                add(
272→                    NumberSpanParserOperation(
273→                        listOf(
274→                            UnsignedIntConsumer(
275→                                minNumberLength - if (withMinus) 1 else 0,
276→                                maxNumberLength - if (withMinus) 1 else 0,
277→                                setter,
278→                                name,
279→                                multiplyByMinus1 = withMinus,
280→                            )
281→                        )
282→                    )
283→                )
284→            },
285→            emptyList()
286→        )
287→    }
288→
289→    val maxPaddedNumberLength = minOf(maxNumberLength, spacePadding)
290→    if (minNumberLength >= maxPaddedNumberLength) return numberOfRequiredLengths(minNumberLength, maxNumberLength)
291→    // invariant: the length of the string parsed by 'accumulated' is exactly 'accumulatedWidth'
292→    var accumulated: ParserStructure<Target> = numberOfRequiredLengths(minNumberLength, minNumberLength)
293→    for (accumulatedWidth in minNumberLength until maxPaddedNumberLength) {
294→        accumulated = ParserStructure(
295→            emptyList(),
296→            listOf(
297→                numberOfRequiredLengths(accumulatedWidth + 1, accumulatedWidth + 1),
298→                listOf(
299→                    ParserStructure(listOf(PlainStringParserOperation(" ")), emptyList()),
300→                    accumulated
301→                ).concat()
302→            )
303→        )
304→    }
305→    // accumulatedWidth == maxNumberLength || accumulatedWidth == spacePadding.
306→    // In the first case, we're done, in the second case, we need to add the remaining numeric lengths.
307→    return if (spacePadding > maxNumberLength) {
308→        val prepadding = PlainStringParserOperation<Target>(" ".repeat(spacePadding - maxNumberLength))
309→        listOf(
310→            ParserStructure(
311→                listOf(
312→                    prepadding,
313→                ),
314→                emptyList()
315→            ), accumulated
316→        ).concat()
317→    } else if (spacePadding == maxNumberLength) {
318→        accumulated
319→    } else {
320→        val r = ParserStructure(
321→            emptyList(),
322→            listOf(
323→                numberOfRequiredLengths(spacePadding + 1, maxNumberLength),
324→                accumulated
325→            )
326→        )
327→        r
328→    }
329→}

391→internal interface AssignableField<in Object, Type> {
392→    /**
393→     * If the field is not set, sets it to the given value.
394→     * If the field is set to the given value, does nothing.
395→     * If the field is set to a different value, throws [IllegalArgumentException].
396→     *
397→     * This function is used to ensure internal consistency during parsing.
398→     * There exist formats where the same data is repeated several times in the same object, for example,
399→     * "14:15 (02:15 PM)". In such cases, we want to ensure that the values are consistent.
400→     */
401→    fun trySetWithoutReassigning(container: Object, newValue: Type): Type?
402→
403→    /**
404→     * The name of the field.
405→     */
406→    val name: String
407→}
408→
409→private fun <Object, Type> AssignableField<Object, Type>.setWithoutReassigning(
410→    receiver: Object,
411→    value: Type,
412→    position: Int,
413→    nextIndex: Int
414→): ParseResult {
415→    val conflictingValue = trySetWithoutReassigning(receiver, value)
416→    return if (conflictingValue === null) {
417→        ParseResult.Ok(nextIndex)
418→    } else {
419→        ParseResult.Error(position) {
420→            "Attempting to assign conflicting values '$conflictingValue' and '$value' to field '$name'"
421→        }
422→    }
423→}

 16→    /**
 17→     * The field parsed and formatted by this directive.
 18→     */
 19→    val field: FieldSpec<Target, *>

 21→    /**
 22→     * The formatter operation that formats the field.
 23→     */
 24→    fun formatter(): FormatterStructure<Target>
 25→
 26→    /**
 27→     * The parser structure that parses the field.
 28→     */
 29→    fun parser(): ParserStructure<Target>

 31→    /**
 32→     * The string with the code that, when evaluated in the builder context, appends the directive.

 37→/**
 38→ * A directive for a decimal format of an integer field that is known to be unsigned.
 39→ * The field is formatted with the field padded to [minDigits] with zeroes,
 40→ * and the parser expects the field to be at least [minDigits] digits long.
 41→ */
 42→internal abstract class UnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<in Target>(
 43→    final override val field: UnsignedFieldSpec<Target>,
 44→    private val minDigits: Int,
 45→    private val spacePadding: Int?,
 46→) : FieldFormatDirective<Target> {
 47→
 48→    private val maxDigits: Int = field.maxDigits
 49→
 50→    init {
 51→        require(minDigits >= 0) {
 52→            "The minimum number of digits ($minDigits) is negative"
 53→        }
 54→        require(maxDigits >= minDigits) {
 55→            "The maximum number of digits ($maxDigits) is less than the minimum number of digits ($minDigits)"
 56→        }
 57→        if (spacePadding != null) {
 58→            require(spacePadding > minDigits) {
 59→                "The space padding ($spacePadding) should be more than the minimum number of digits ($minDigits)"
 60→            }
 61→        }
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    override fun formatter(): FormatterStructure<Target> {
 65→        val formatter = UnsignedIntFormatterStructure(
 66→            number = field.accessor::getterNotNull,
 67→            zeroPadding = minDigits,
 68→        )
 69→        return if (spacePadding != null) SpacePaddedFormatter(formatter, spacePadding) else formatter
 70→    }
 71→
 72→    override fun parser(): ParserStructure<Target> =
 73→        spaceAndZeroPaddedUnsignedInt(minDigits, maxDigits, spacePadding, field.accessor, field.name)
 74→}

 79→internal abstract class NamedUnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<in Target>(
 80→    final override val field: UnsignedFieldSpec<Target>,
 81→    private val values: List<String>,
 82→    private val name: String,
 83→) : FieldFormatDirective<Target> {
 84→
 85→    init {
 86→        require(values.size == field.maxValue - field.minValue + 1) {
 87→            "The number of values (${values.size}) in $values does not match the range of the field (${field.maxValue - field.minValue + 1})"
 88→        }
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    private fun getStringValue(target: Target): String = field.accessor.getterNotNull(target).let {
 92→        values.getOrNull(it-field.minValue)
 93→            ?: "The value $it of ${field.name} does not have a corresponding string representation"
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private inner class AssignableString: AssignableField<Target, String> {
 97→        override fun trySetWithoutReassigning(container: Target, newValue: String): String? =
 98→            field.accessor.trySetWithoutReassigning(container, values.indexOf(newValue) + field.minValue)?.let {
 99→                values[it - field.minValue]
100→            }
101→
102→        override val name: String get() = this@NamedUnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective.name
103→    }
104→
105→    override fun formatter(): FormatterStructure<Target> =
106→        StringFormatterStructure(::getStringValue)
107→
108→    override fun parser(): ParserStructure<Target> =
109→        ParserStructure(
110→            listOf(
111→                StringSetParserOperation(values, AssignableString(), "One of $values for $name")
112→            ), emptyList()
113→        )
114→}

141→ */
142→internal class IncompleteLocalDate(
143→    override var year: Int? = null,
144→    override var monthNumber: Int? = null,
145→    override var dayOfMonth: Int? = null,
146→    override var isoDayOfWeek: Int? = null
147→) : DateFieldContainer, Copyable<IncompleteLocalDate> {
148→    fun toLocalDate(): LocalDate {
149→        val date = LocalDate(
150→            requireParsedField(year, "year"),
151→            requireParsedField(monthNumber, "monthNumber"),
152→            requireParsedField(dayOfMonth, "dayOfMonth")
153→        )
154→        isoDayOfWeek?.let {
155→            if (it != date.dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber) {
156→                throw DateTimeFormatException(
157→                    "Can not create a LocalDate from the given input: " +
158→                        "the day of week is ${DayOfWeek(it)} but the date is $date, which is a ${date.dayOfWeek}"
159→                )
160→            }
161→        }
162→        return date
163→    }
164→
165→    fun populateFrom(date: LocalDate) {
166→        year = date.year
167→        monthNumber = date.monthNumber
168→        dayOfMonth = date.dayOfMonth
169→        isoDayOfWeek = date.dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber
170→    }
171→
172→    override fun copy(): IncompleteLocalDate = IncompleteLocalDate(year, monthNumber, dayOfMonth, isoDayOfWeek)
173→
174→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
175→        other is IncompleteLocalDate && year == other.year && monthNumber == other.monthNumber &&
176→            dayOfMonth == other.dayOfMonth && isoDayOfWeek == other.isoDayOfWeek
177→
178→    override fun hashCode(): Int =
179→        year.hashCode() * 31 + monthNumber.hashCode() * 31 + dayOfMonth.hashCode() * 31 + isoDayOfWeek.hashCode() * 31
180→
181→    override fun toString(): String =
182→        "${year ?: "??"}-${monthNumber ?: "??"}-${dayOfMonth ?: "??"} (day of week is ${isoDayOfWeek ?: "??"})"
183→}
184→
185→private class YearDirective(private val padding: Padding, private val isYearOfEra: Boolean = false) :
186→    SignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
187→        DateFields.year,
188→        minDigits = padding.minDigits(4),
189→        maxDigits = null,
190→        spacePadding = padding.spaces(4),
191→        outputPlusOnExceededWidth = 4,
192→    ) {
193→    override val builderRepresentation: String
194→        get() = when (padding) {
195→            Padding.ZERO -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::year.name}()"
196→            else -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::year.name}(${padding.toKotlinCode()})"
197→        }.let {
198→            if (isYearOfEra) {
199→                it + YEAR_OF_ERA_COMMENT
200→            } else it
201→        }
202→
203→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
204→        other is YearDirective && padding == other.padding && isYearOfEra == other.isYearOfEra
205→
206→    override fun hashCode(): Int = padding.hashCode() * 31 + isYearOfEra.hashCode()
207→}
208→
209→private class ReducedYearDirective(val base: Int, private val isYearOfEra: Boolean = false) :
210→    ReducedIntFieldDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
211→        DateFields.year,
212→        digits = 2,
213→        base = base,
214→    ) {
215→    override val builderRepresentation: String
216→        get() =
217→            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::yearTwoDigits.name}($base)".let {
218→                if (isYearOfEra) {
219→                    it + YEAR_OF_ERA_COMMENT
220→                } else it
221→            }
222→
223→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
224→        other is ReducedYearDirective && base == other.base && isYearOfEra == other.isYearOfEra
225→
226→    override fun hashCode(): Int = base.hashCode() * 31 + isYearOfEra.hashCode()
227→}

229→private const val YEAR_OF_ERA_COMMENT =
230→    " /** TODO: the original format had an `y` directive, so the behavior is different on years earlier than 1 AD. See the [kotlinx.datetime.format.byUnicodePattern] documentation for details. */"
231→
232→/**
233→ * A special directive for year-of-era that behaves equivalently to [DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.year].
234→ * This is the result of calling [byUnicodePattern] on a pattern that uses the ubiquitous "y" symbol.
235→ * We need a separate directive so that, when using [DateTimeFormat.formatAsKotlinBuilderDsl], we can print an
236→ * additional comment and explain that the behavior was not preserved exactly.
237→ */
238→internal fun DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.yearOfEra(padding: Padding) {
239→    @Suppress("NO_ELSE_IN_WHEN")
240→    when (this) {
241→        is AbstractWithDateBuilder -> addFormatStructureForDate(
242→            BasicFormatStructure(YearDirective(padding, isYearOfEra = true))
243→        )
244→    }
245→}
246→
247→/**
248→ * A special directive for year-of-era that behaves equivalently to [DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.year].
249→ * This is the result of calling [byUnicodePattern] on a pattern that uses the ubiquitous "y" symbol.
250→ * We need a separate directive so that, when using [DateTimeFormat.formatAsKotlinBuilderDsl], we can print an
251→ * additional comment and explain that the behavior was not preserved exactly.
252→ */
253→internal fun DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.yearOfEraTwoDigits(baseYear: Int) {

255→    when (this) {

257→            BasicFormatStructure(ReducedYearDirective(baseYear, isYearOfEra = true))
258→        )
259→    }
260→}

262→private class MonthDirective(private val padding: Padding) :
263→    UnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
264→        DateFields.month,
265→        minDigits = padding.minDigits(2),
266→        spacePadding = padding.spaces(2),
267→    ) {
268→    override val builderRepresentation: String
269→        get() = when (padding) {
270→            Padding.ZERO -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::monthNumber.name}()"
271→            else -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::monthNumber.name}(${padding.toKotlinCode()})"
272→        }
273→
274→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is MonthDirective && padding == other.padding
275→    override fun hashCode(): Int = padding.hashCode()
276→}
277→
278→private class MonthNameDirective(private val names: MonthNames) :
279→    NamedUnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(DateFields.month, names.names, "monthName") {
280→    override val builderRepresentation: String

282→            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::monthName.name}(${names.toKotlinCode()})"
283→
284→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is MonthNameDirective && names.names == other.names.names

292→        spacePadding = padding.spaces(2),
293→    ) {
294→    override val builderRepresentation: String

296→            Padding.ZERO -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::dayOfMonth.name}()"
297→            else -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::dayOfMonth.name}(${padding.toKotlinCode()})"

305→    NamedUnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(DateFields.isoDayOfWeek, names.names, "dayOfWeekName") {
306→
307→    override val builderRepresentation: String
308→        get() =
309→            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::dayOfWeek.name}(${names.toKotlinCode()})"
310→
311→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is DayOfWeekDirective && names.names == other.names.names
312→    override fun hashCode(): Int = names.names.hashCode()

315→internal class LocalDateFormat(override val actualFormat: CachedFormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>) :
316→    AbstractDateTimeFormat<LocalDate, IncompleteLocalDate>() {
317→    override fun intermediateFromValue(value: LocalDate): IncompleteLocalDate =
318→        IncompleteLocalDate().apply { populateFrom(value) }
319→
320→    override fun valueFromIntermediate(intermediate: IncompleteLocalDate): LocalDate = intermediate.toLocalDate()
321→
322→    override val emptyIntermediate get() = emptyIncompleteLocalDate
323→
324→    companion object {
325→        fun build(block: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<LocalDate> {
326→            val builder = Builder(AppendableFormatStructure())
327→            builder.block()
328→            return LocalDateFormat(builder.build())
329→        }
330→    }
331→
332→    internal class Builder(override val actualBuilder: AppendableFormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>) :
333→        AbstractDateTimeFormatBuilder<DateFieldContainer, Builder>, AbstractWithDateBuilder {
334→
335→        override fun addFormatStructureForDate(structure: FormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>) =
336→            actualBuilder.add(structure)
337→
338→        override fun createEmpty(): Builder = Builder(AppendableFormatStructure())
339→    }
340→}
341→
342→internal interface AbstractWithDateBuilder : DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate {
343→    fun addFormatStructureForDate(structure: FormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>)
344→
345→    override fun year(padding: Padding) =
346→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(YearDirective(padding)))
347→
348→    override fun yearTwoDigits(baseYear: Int) =
349→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(ReducedYearDirective(baseYear)))
350→
351→    override fun monthNumber(padding: Padding) =
352→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(MonthDirective(padding)))
353→
354→    override fun monthName(names: MonthNames) =
355→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(MonthNameDirective(names)))
356→
357→    override fun dayOfMonth(padding: Padding) = addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(DayDirective(padding)))
358→    override fun dayOfWeek(names: DayOfWeekNames) =
359→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(DayOfWeekDirective(names)))
360→
361→    @Suppress("NO_ELSE_IN_WHEN")
362→    override fun date(format: DateTimeFormat<LocalDate>) = when (format) {
363→        is LocalDateFormat -> addFormatStructureForDate(format.actualFormat)
364→    }
365→}
366→
367→// these are constants so that the formats are not recreated every time they are used
368→internal val ISO_DATE by lazy {
369→    LocalDateFormat.build { year(); char('-'); monthNumber(); char('-'); dayOfMonth() }
370→}
371→internal val ISO_DATE_BASIC by lazy {
372→    LocalDateFormat.build { year(); monthNumber(); dayOfMonth() }
373→}
374→
375→private val emptyIncompleteLocalDate = IncompleteLocalDate()

119→internal abstract class NamedEnumIntFieldFormatDirective<in Target, Type>(
120→    final override val field: FieldSpec<Target, Type>,
121→    private val mapping: Map<Type, String>,
122→    private val name: String,
123→) : FieldFormatDirective<Target> {
124→
125→    private val reverseMapping = mapping.entries.associate { it.value to it.key }
126→
127→    private fun getStringValue(target: Target): String = field.accessor.getterNotNull(target).let {
128→        mapping[field.accessor.getterNotNull(target)]
129→            ?: "The value $it of ${field.name} does not have a corresponding string representation"
130→    }
131→
132→    private inner class AssignableString: AssignableField<Target, String> {
133→        override fun trySetWithoutReassigning(container: Target, newValue: String): String? =
134→            field.accessor.trySetWithoutReassigning(container, reverseMapping[newValue]!!)?.let { mapping[it] }
135→
136→        override val name: String get() = this@NamedEnumIntFieldFormatDirective.name
137→    }
